Blog posts. To add one: copy an entry, give it a unique slug (used in the URL /post?slug=...), set date as YYYY-MM-DD, and write body as an HTML string (use

,

,

  • ). Newest first is by date automatically. cover is optional (path under images/). Replace these SAMPLE posts with real content.

posts.title: Kokapet vs Tellapur: where to buy in West Hyderabad in 2026
posts.author: Radhakrishnama Raju
posts.excerpt: Two of Hyderabad's fastest-appreciating corridors, compared on price, connectivity, and rental demand. A practical buyer's view.
posts.body:
SAMPLE POST — replace with your own content.

Why West Hyderabad

The Financial District pull has turned Kokapet and Tellapur into two of the city's most-watched pockets. Both sit minutes from the ORR, both have HMDA-approved gated ventures, and both have seen sharp appreciation since 2023.

Price and appreciation

Kokapet commands a premium for its Neopolis layout and proximity to premium high-rises. Tellapur offers a lower entry point with strong upside as infrastructure catches up.

Who should buy where

  • End-user wanting a ready high-rise: Kokapet.
  • Investor seeking a plot with runway: Tellapur.
  • Rental yield near the IT corridor: both perform well.

Want a shortlist tailored to your budget? Get in touch.

posts.title: Buying an open plot? A 7-point clear-title checklist
posts.author: Radhakrishnama Raju
posts.excerpt: Before you register an open plot in Telangana or Andhra Pradesh, run through these seven checks to avoid title trouble later.
posts.body:
SAMPLE POST — replace with your own content.

The 7 checks

  • Approval: HMDA / DTCP / BMRDA layout number, verified online.
  • Title chain: 30-year link documents, no breaks.
  • Encumbrance certificate: clean EC for the last 15+ years.
  • Survey number: matches the pahani / adangal record.
  • Prohibited-property list: plot is not in 22-A / prohibited land.
  • Physical survey: boundaries and extent match the FMB sketch.
  • Registration value: aligns with the sub-registrar's guidance value.

We run every one of these before we put a plot in front of you. Browse verified plots.
